exam_price_notes: Prices vary based on training mode (On-Demand, Live Online, etc.)

testing_centers.notes: Online proctored via EC-Council's own portal
In-person at Pearson VUE authorized test centers

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID with full name and photo. ID must match the name used during registration.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or electronic devices. No internet access during exam. Scratch paper may be provided. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Earn 120 ECE (EC-Council Continuing Education) credits over 3-year cycle. ECE credits earned through courses, conferences, publications, or EC-Council activities.
target_audience: IT and systems administrators, network defenders, cybersecurity professionals

retake_policy.notes: No official waiting period specified between retakes. Full exam fee required for each retake.

objectives.title: Understand attack techniques and hacking methodologies
sub_objectives: Understand attack, threat, and vulnerability concepts
Understand network attacks, application attacks, and social engineering attacks
Understand attack surface analysis and threat intelligence

objectives.title: Implement security policies and compliance efforts
sub_objectives: Understand compliance and regulatory frameworks
Implement security policies and asset management

objectives.title: Implement access control and identity management
sub_objectives: Understand access control, authentication, and authorization
Implement cryptographic security techniques

objectives.title: Configure network perimeter devices
sub_objectives: Understand firewalls, IDS/IPS, and router/switch security
Implement perimeter protection using firewalls and IDS/IPS

objectives.title: Secure Windows systems
sub_objectives: Understand Windows security risks and components
Implement Windows security baseline configurations and patch management

objectives.title: Secure Linux systems
sub_objectives: Understand Linux security risks and hardening techniques
Implement Linux security policies and file integrity monitoring

objectives.title: Secure mobile devices
sub_objectives: Implement mobile device management (MDM) and mobile threat defense (MTD)
Understand BYOD, COPE, and mobile application security

objectives.title: Secure IoT devices
sub_objectives: Understand IoT security risks and best practices
Implement IoT communication security and device hardening

objectives.title: Secure applications
sub_objectives: Implement application whitelisting, sandboxing, and patch management
Implement web application firewalls (WAFs)

objectives.title: Secure data
sub_objectives: Implement data encryption, data masking, and data loss prevention (DLP)
Understand data backup, retention, and integrity

objectives.title: Secure virtual networks
sub_objectives: Understand network virtualization, software-defined networks (SDN), and container security

objectives.title: Secure enterprise cloud platforms
sub_objectives: Implement cloud security for AWS, Azure, and GCP
Understand shared responsibility models and cloud security tools

objectives.title: Secure wireless networks
sub_objectives: Implement wireless network encryption, authentication, and security measures
Understand Wi-Fi security tools and standards

objectives.title: Monitor and analyze network traffic
sub_objectives: Use tools like Wireshark, tcpdump, and PRTG for traffic monitoring and analysis
Detect threats and anomalies in network traffic

objectives.title: Monitor and analyze network logs
sub_objectives: Analyze logs from Windows, Linux, Mac, and network devices
Implement centralized log management

objectives.title: Respond to security incidents and conduct forensics
sub_objectives: Implement incident response processes
Conduct forensics investigation and threat hunting

objectives.title: Implement business continuity and disaster recovery
sub_objectives: Understand business continuity management (BCM) and disaster recovery (DR)
Implement business continuity and disaster recovery scenarios

objectives.title: Implement risk management
sub_objectives: Conduct risk identification, assessment, and treatment
Implement vulnerability management and privacy impact assessments (PIA)

domains.name: Threat Assessment with Attack Surface Analysis

objectives.title: Conduct attack surface analysis
sub_objectives: Analyze system, network, and software attack surfaces
Implement attack surface reduction and monitoring

domains.name: Threat Prediction with Cyber Threat Intelligence

objectives.title: Implement threat intelligence
sub_objectives: Integrate threat intelligence feeds
Conduct threat hunting and analysis
